title: Akluj Fort
tagline: Akluj Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: This fort was built by Yadav king Raja Singhan in the 13th century.
overview.description: This fort was built by Yadav king Raja Singhan in the 13th century. In that period, this fort was completely destroyed in the war. The history of this fort is not very long and its middle history almost vanished in that period. In history that mentioned (In Moghal period it was also known as Asadnagar) Sambhaji along with 26 others was captured by Mukarrab Khan from Sangameshwar and brought to this fort The fort was ruled by Bahmani Kingdom, Sultanate of Bijapur, Mughal Empire, and Maratha Empire.

topPlaces.name: Akluj
topPlaces.description: Akluj is a town on the banks of Nira in Solapur district, Maharashtra, India. Akluj was earlier known for its large trade in cotton, which has almost disappeared at present.

topPlaces.name: Malshiras
topPlaces.description: Malshiras is a town and the headquarters of Malshiras taluka in Solapur district of Maharashtra state in western India. Its governing body was promoted to Nagar Panchayat from a Gram Panchayat in 2017.

items.note: Akluj is a town on the banks of Nira in Solapur district, Maharashtra, India. Akluj was earlier known for its large trade in cotton, which has almost disappeared at present.

Malshiras is a town and the headquarters of Malshiras taluka in Solapur district of Maharashtra state in western India. Its governing body was promoted to Nagar Panchayat from a Gram Panchayat in 2017.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Akluj Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Akluj Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Akluj Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (139 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (97 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Akluj Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Akluj Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Akluj Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Akluj Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Akluj Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Akluj, Malshiras.
